ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_number" TEXT /* Course number identifier */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., LAB, LEC, REC) */,
  "credit_hrs" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days the course meets */,
  "times" TEXT /* Time when the course meets */,
  "reserved_majors" INTEGER /* Number of majors reserved for the course */,
  "reserved_majors_limit" INTEGER /* Limit on the number of majors that can reserve spots */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "enrolled_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisite_required" INTEGER /* Whether a prerequisite is required to enroll */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed on the waitlist */,
  "max_students_per_section" INTEGER /* Maximum students allowed per section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the course was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the instructor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the instructor was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Major the student is pursuing */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree the student is pursuing */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Graduation date of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the student was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department that offers the major */,
  "major_description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "required_courses" TEXT /* List of required courses for the major */,
  "elective_courses" TEXT /* List of elective courses for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the department's office */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "chair_name" TEXT /* Name of the department chair */,
  "chair_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department chair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance record of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., Co-req, Pre-req) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is full */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the feedback pertains to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material is associated with */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., textbook, article) */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the material was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the schedule is created */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student performing the action */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., enroll, drop, waitlist) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registration_logs_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registration_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Student, Faculty, Admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (student or faculty) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user-role association was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
